nasb.text: But Jesus, overhearing what was being spoken, *said to the synagogue official, “Do not be afraid any longer, only believe.”

esv.text: But overhearing what they said, Jesus said to the ruler of the synagogue, “Do not fear, only believe.”

cnv.text: 耶穌聽見所說的話，就對會堂主管說：“不要怕！只要信！”

ccb.text: 耶稣听了，便对雅鲁说：“不要怕，只要信。”

csbs.text: 耶稣却当做没听见他们所说的话，对会堂主管说：“不要怕，只要信！”
